key: Heavy rain looping clip
AudoMixer used for the rain sound
Intensity of rain (0-1)
Rain particle system
Particles system for when rain hits something
Particle system to use for rain mist
The threshold for intensity (0 - 1) at which mist starts to appear
Wind looping clip
Wind sound volume modifier, use this to lower your sound if it's too loud.
Wind zone that will affect and follow the rain

X = minimum wind speed. Y = maximum wind speed. Z = sound multiplier. Wind speed is divided by Z to get sound multiplier value. Set Z to lower than Y to increase wind sound volume, or higher to decrease wind sound volume.
How often the wind speed and direction changes (minimum and maximum change interval in seconds)
Whether wind should be enabled.
The height above the camera that the rain will start falling from
How far the rain particle system is ahead of the player
The top y value of the mist particles
The starting y offset for rain and mist. This will be offset as a percentage of visible height from the top of the visible world.
The total width of the rain and mist as a percentage of visible width
Collision mask for the rain particles
Lifetime to assign to rain particles that have collided. 0 for instant death. This can allow the rain to penetrate a little bit beyond the collision point.
Multiply the velocity of any mist colliding by this amount
